allow:
Bash(/tmp/mcp_stderr.log -c "
import asyncio
from mcp.client.sse import sse_client
from mcp.client.session import ClientSession

async def test_sse\(\):
    print\(''Connecting to MCP SSE...'', flush=True\)
    async with sse_client\(''http://localhost:8000/mcp/sse''\) as \(read, write\):
        async with ClientSession\(read, write\) as session:
            result = await session.initialize\(\)
            print\(f''OK: Connected to ""{result.serverInfo.name}""'', flush=True\)
            
            tools_result = await session.list_tools\(\)
            tool_names = [t.name for t in tools_result.tools]
            print\(f''OK: {len\(tool_names\)} tools: {tool_names}'', flush=True\)
            
            res_result = await session.list_resources\(\)
            print\(f''OK: {len\(res_result.resources\)} resources'', flush=True\)
            
            r = await session.call_tool\(''where_to_put'', {''component_type'': ''service''}\)
            text = r.content[0].text
            print\(f''OK: where_to_put -> {len\(text\)} chars'', flush=True\)

            r2 = await session.call_tool\(''validate_import'', {
                ''source_file'': ''src/api/routes/users.py'',
                ''target_import'': ''src/infrastructure/db''
            }\)
            print\(f''OK: validate_import -> {len\(r2.content[0].text\)} chars'', flush=True\)

            r3 = await session.call_tool\(''check_naming'', {
                ''scope'': ''classes'',
                ''name'': ''UserService''
            }\)
            print\(f''OK: check_naming -> {len\(r3.content[0].text\)} chars'', flush=True\)
            
            print\(''ALL SSE TESTS PASSED'', flush=True\)

asyncio.run\(test_sse\(\)\)
")
